title: Live results: Crockett, Talarico seek Democratic nod in Texas Senate race
author: The Hill Staff
fullText: Texas state Rep. James Talarico and Rep. Jasmine Crockett are facing off Tuesday in the Democratic primary for incumbent Sen. John Cornyn’s (R) seat. One candidate must secure more than 50 percent of Tuesday’s vote to avoid a runoff in May. Follow Decision Desk HQ’s live results here.
summary: Texas state Rep. James Talarico and Rep. Jasmine Crockett are facing off Tuesday in the Democratic primary for incumbent Sen. John Cornyn’s (R) seat. One candidate must secure more than 50 percent of Tuesday’s vote to avoid a runoff in May. Follow Decision Desk HQ’s live results here.
